channel.title: Night Owl
channel.description: Automatic update feed for Night Owl.

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
Night Owl 1.0

First release distributed with built-in automatic updates.

  • In-app updates: Night Owl now checks for new versions and updates itself.
  • Accurate capture hours: integration time is reconciled per observation night, so a target's total reflects every night it was imaged.
  • Sky map, plate-solve pointing checks, and mosaic planning.
